name: SearchReplace

old_str.description: The SEARCH section, a contiguous chunk of lines to search for.

new_str.description: The REPLACE section to replace into the file.

description: Edit files with search and replace. The old_str must match exactly what exists in the file. Only replaces the first match occurrence.
description_zh: 使用搜索替换编辑文件。old_str必须与文件中存在的内容完全匹配。仅替换第一个匹配项。
examples: Replace a function: old_str="def old_func():\n    pass", new_str="def new_func():\n    return True"
examples_zh: 替换函数: old_str="def old_func():\n    pass", new_str="def new_func():\n    return True"
